message:
test(fcp-conformance/canonical-id): pin §3.1 ID validation contract across CapabilityId/ConnectorId/InstanceId/OperationId (resolves flywheel_connectors-9szvo)

33 tests covering validate_canonical_id rule set + the four ID types
that share it: empty/length/non-ASCII/uppercase/start-char/mid-char
rejection, allowed punctuation, from_static panic-on-invalid, serde
try_from rejection of malformed JSON, FromStr/Display/AsRef parity,
ConnectorId name:archetype:version composition, InstanceId
inst_<uuid> canonicity + uniqueness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
